excludedCommands.reason: Current manager actions are Windows-specific and system-changing, so they are intentionally excluded from Linux CI.
The deterministic Linux manager matrix does not include a manager with reliable CI-safe custom source mutation.
The deterministic Linux manager matrix does not include a manager with reliable CI-safe custom source mutation.
Queued package downloads complete too quickly on current Linux CI runners to guarantee a stable cancellable operation window.
A deterministic retry scenario depends on first forcing a stable failed or canceled operation, which is not yet reliable in CI.
Queued package downloads complete too quickly on current Linux CI runners to guarantee a stable reorderable operation window.
GitHub device-flow authentication is intentionally excluded from deterministic CI.
Cloud backup flows depend on external authenticated GitHub state and are intentionally excluded from deterministic CI.
